The residence
Lake Farka setting

Location & setting

On the shore of Lake Farka

Lake Farka — Liqeni i Farkës — is one of Tirana's most sought-after green addresses: water, woodland and shoreline walks, yet a short drive from the city centre, the Grand Park and the business district. Swan Lake Residence sits directly on the water in the Kodra e Diellit quarter, with Villa Odette positioned for open views across the lake.

Private pool & garden veranda
Three living levels + roof terrace
